programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: The annual All Valley Karate Tournament kicks off as several competing dojos vie for the grand championship - and settle some personal scores.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 10
programme.desc: The tournament comes to a shocking end, with the aftermath leaving its participants reeling - and two champions facing uncertain futures.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 1
programme.desc: 34 years after losing the All Valley Karate Championship, Johnny Lawrence decides to reopen the Cobra Kai Dojo while his school adversary, Daniel LaRusso, runs a successful auto business.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 2
programme.desc: Daniel is dismayed to find a new Cobra Kai dojo has been opened up. Johnny learns his dojo has to pass several safety requirements before he can actually start teaching.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 3
programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny advertise Cobra Kai on the web. Daniel agrees to chaperon at the Halloween dance so he can keep an eye on his daughter.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 4
programme.desc: Robbie is in hot water with his father. Johnny plans to shut down Cobra Kai after Miguel is injured. Samantha and Kyler's relationship hits rock bottom. A vandalized billboard creates tension for Daniel.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 5
programme.desc: Cobra Kai gains it's second student. Daniel has an intricate plan to get payback on Johnny. Miguel defends Samantha against Kyler during lunch break.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 6
programme.desc: Johnny's dojo class attracts a group of misfits while his son Robby, who harbors ulterior motives, lands a new job. Samantha makes a new friend in science class. Daniel inspires interest in karate from an unlikely person.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 7
programme.desc: When Johnny learns Cobra Kai is banned from the All Valley Tournament, he faces the City Council. Miguel asks Samantha out. Robbie takes lessons from Daniel, just as his buddies plot a heist from LaRusso Auto.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 8
programme.desc: Johnny prepares his Cobra Kai students for the next All Valley Karate Tournament and in turn, he is inspired to clean up his life. Daniel is still unaware of his new pupil's background.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 9
programme.desc: Louie's reckless actions forces Johnny and Daniel to go down memory lane. The Cobra Kai students plot revenge against the popular kids. Miguel grows impatient with Samantha.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 10
programme.desc: It is the day of the 2018 All Valley Karate Tournament and Cobra Kai is determined to win. Robbie signs up unaffiliated. A familiar face from the past returns.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Cobra Kai’s win at the Under 18 All Valley Karate Championships, Johnny questions his dojo’s philosophy and deals with a figure from his past. Daniel searches for the right way to respond to Cobra Kai’s dominance.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Daniel starts teaching his first karate students, he questions whether he can fill Mr. Miyagi’s shoes. Johnny invents some unorthodox training methods with help from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Daniel pulls out all the stops in an effort to recruit new students to Miyagi Do. Johnny reflects on some of the major relationships in his life - and responds to Daniel’s promotional efforts with his own.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Daniel makes another attempt to promote Miyagi Do, and receives guidance in a familiar form. Johnny grows suspicious about Kreese’s backstory. A new Cobra Kai student challenges Miguel and befriends Aisha, while Robby revisits a past he’d rather forget.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Daniel struggles to help a new student learn. Miguel makes a new connection, while Johnny tries to repair a relationship. Tensions between the two dojos build to a breaking point.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Daniel’s students are given a lesson in overcoming their grudges. Johnny spends some time away from the dojo, while Kreese exerts his influence.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: To prepare his students, Daniel gives some new training methods a shot. Miguel puts a new lesson into practice. Johnny makes a tough but pivotal decision that affects Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Daniel works to make amends with Amanda, while Johnny is introduced to the world of dating apps. Complications arise when Miguel, Samantha, Robby and Tory cross paths.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Johnny cautiously takes a stab at love, while Daniel and Amanda enjoy a romantic date night. An attempt to bring the students of the two dojos together backfires as hostilities between the teens escalate.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Miguel's fighting for his life, Robby's missing, and Daniel and Johnny's reputations are in tatters as the community reacts to the West Valley brawl.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Daniel and Johnny team up to find Robby. Miguel faces an uncertain future. Kreese tries to bring Tory back to Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Daniel's tarnished public image takes a toll on his sales, leading to a takeover offer. Johnny tries to raise money for Miguel's surgery.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Following an important meeting in Japan, Daniel revisits Mr. Miyagi's hometown in Okinawa. Johnny attempts to reconnect with Robby.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: In Okinawa, Daniel spends time with an old friend - and an old enemy, who has much to teach him. The dueling dojos' rivalry comes to a nasty head.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny craft the perfect social media message. Kreese scouts new recruits while Daniel and Amanda try to shut down Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Daniel spends some father-daughter time with a traumatized Sam. Johnny plans to form a new karate dojo but struggles to come up with a cool name.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 8
programme.desc: Informed that this year's All Valley Karate Tournament is being canceled, the three competing sensei attend a city council meeting to save it.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 9
programme.desc: It's Christmastime in the Valley, and romance is in the air. Daniel and Miguel find unexpected common ground, and the Cobra Kai recruits go on a mission.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Old wounds begin to heal at a country club Christmas party, but a brutal assault by Kreese's students leads to new betrayals and alliances.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Johnny and Daniel combine dojos but their opposing styles immediately clash. Kreese tries to persuade a former partner to rejoin him at Cobra Kai.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Johnny picks up defensive strategies while Daniels learns how to go on the offensive. Amanda confronts Tory. New kid Kenny is bullied at school.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Kenny tries to become a student of Cobra Kai with some encouragement from Robby, while Johnny urges Sam to take a leap of faith - in herself.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Kreese brings Terry back to Cobra Kai, but his former partner is not interested in repeating history. Johnny grows envious of Daniel mentoring Miguel.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Johnny and Daniel's dojo - and their fragile alliance - teeter on the brink of collapse when they agree to a winner-takes-all sensei showdown.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 6
programme.desc: A major change to the upcoming tournament sends Johnny scrambling to find a new recruit for Eagle Fang. Tory must ask a favor of the LaRussos.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 7
programme.desc: Daniel invites Anthony to join Miyagi-Do and discovers he doesn't know his son as well as he thought. Miguel learns the truth about Johnny and Carmen.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 8
programme.desc: Miguel and Sam are excited about attending the junior prom until another couple unexpectedly shows up. Terry lures Johnny to a familiar location.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: The annual All Valley Karate Tournament kicks off as several competing dojos vie for the grand championship - and settle some personal scores.

programme.title: Cobra Kai S4 - EP 10
programme.desc: The tournament comes to a shocking end, with the aftermath leaving its participants reeling - and two champions facing uncertain futures.

programme.desc: Daniel is dismayed to find a new Cobra Kai dojo has been opened up. Johnny learns his dojo has to pass several safety requirements before he can actually start teaching.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 3
programme.desc: Miguel helps Johnny advertise Cobra Kai on the web. Daniel agrees to chaperon at the Halloween dance so he can keep an eye on his daughter.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 4
programme.desc: Robbie is in hot water with his father. Johnny plans to shut down Cobra Kai after Miguel is injured. Samantha and Kyler's relationship hits rock bottom. A vandalized billboard creates tension for Daniel.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 5
programme.desc: Cobra Kai gains it's second student. Daniel has an intricate plan to get payback on Johnny. Miguel defends Samantha against Kyler during lunch break.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 6

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 7
programme.desc: When Johnny learns Cobra Kai is banned from the All Valley Tournament, he faces the City Council. Miguel asks Samantha out. Robbie takes lessons from Daniel, just as his buddies plot a heist from LaRusso Auto.

programme.title: Cobra Kai - EP 8
programme.desc: Johnny prepares his Cobra Kai students for the next All Valley Karate Tournament and in turn, he is inspired to clean up his life. Daniel is still unaware of his new pupil's background.

programme.desc: Rachael cooks up pork loin chops with sweet onions and apples, serving it with twice-baked potatoes topped with sour cream and chives - all in minutes!

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 11
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 12
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo tags along as diners test their fate with a toxic pufferfish in Tokyo before biding time with a potentially poisonous pokeberry-forward multi-course menu in North Carolina.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 13
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 14
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 15
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: Love At First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl discovers her daughter Lauren is missing. Despite Cheryl's efforts to seek help from authorities and the media, her pleas are overshadowed by the attention given to the missing white girl's case.

programme.title: A Kidnapping In Amish Country
programme.desc: When Amish woman Lena realises her daughter has been abducted, she is forced to turn to the only person who can help: her estranged best friend Skye, who has renounced the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: Love At First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 6
programme.desc: After 11 hours by train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros learn they have 16 more hours to go - off-road! Bouncing and jolting toward a remote nomadic village, they eat, shop and finally reach their stay.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt - EP 7
programme.desc: Dalene and Pete have lived a nomadic life for many years and want to find an oceanfront home to put down roots while still sparking their creativity. Will they be able finally to settle down?

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt - EP 8
programme.desc: Sara and Russell are ready to escape the sweltering southern heat and start afresh in a charming fishing village along the East Coast. They're searching for the perfect home to embrace a coastal lifestyle.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 7
programme.desc: After dining at a local restaurant, Rachael decides to create her own version of their special dish: Wild Boar Ragu served over Kale Pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany - EP 8
programme.desc: Rachael makes her version of squid ink pasta, prepared with fresh, local calamari, and served on a bed of "tuxedo pasta."

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 19
programme.desc: Buddy is visiting two restaurants that craft their legendary menus around one-star ingredients. First up, he heads to Sweet Potato Sensations in Detroit, Michigan.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out - EP 9
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck. Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face, but is fearful of surgery because of previous problems.

programme.title: Love At First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer: The Alyssa Pladl Story
programme.desc: Alyssa and Steven moved in together when Alyssa was an impressionable teen. After they have a daughter of their own, their path takes a dark turn when Steven becomes physically abusive toward the infant.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: With growing interest in nature-friendly interiors, today's homes are all about nature-friendly elements. We'll introduce you to the "Smart House in Nature" and the extraordinary "Eco-Friendly Open House".

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6) - EP 96
programme.desc: An exciting former rental property dream house turns into a nightmare when everything that can go wrong, does. With an exploding budget, the team will really have to think out of the box.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 6
programme.desc: James and his team are taking on new partners: ambitious real-estate developers Shannon and Christian, who are eager to make their mark. They've found an abandoned mid-century home, hoping to restore it.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers - EP 8
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: In honour of Rachael's rock-star friends, she's making hella mexa suiza burgers, or hamburgers and fries cooked with Mexican spices and topped with Swiss and Mexican soft cheese.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Rachael comes on strong with a flavourful pork chop pizzaiola, made with blistered tomatoes, onions and garlic, cooked a la plancha.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Pad Thai is a crowd favourite, and less intimidating to make than you might think. This recipe literally takes minutes, so Rachael makes the dish twice, with shrimp and with chicken.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 16
programme.desc: Don't feed the animals at these dining establishments, unless they're your dinner companions. Michael joins some furry and ferocious friends for supper on the ocean floor with the sea life of the Maldives.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 17
programme.desc: The restaurants in this episode might be a little scary, but they also serve up food that's scarily good! Join host Michael Yo on a visit to a Tokyo restaurant dedicated to vampires.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 18
programme.desc: Get ready for host Michael Yo's brain-bending journey to five restaurants that are meant to play tricks on your mind. Have an "a-ha!" moment inside a black-and-white comic-book world in Chicago.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 19
programme.desc: If you're hungry for excitement, this episode will certainly satisfy the most ravenous appetite for adventure. Join host Michael Yo for a wild desert horse-ride to a delicious dinner.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 20
programme.desc: These cooking methods have aged like a fine. Join host Michael Yo for a history lesson in five culinary customs, from Mayan meat-smoking to steaming fish with heat from ancient hot springs.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For

The contenders face off in a three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat the reigning Titans on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship round. Dwayne Johnson serves as Host while Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Regional competition has come to an end and the final Titans from the Central, West and Eastern divisions have advanced to the Championship. Those six elite Titans return for the final rounds of competition. The top two men and women will advance to compete on Mount Olympus one last time. In the end, one man and one woman will be crowned Titan Champions.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: CNBC Sports - Asian Le Mans Series
programme.desc: Created by the Automobile Club de l’Ouest (ACO), the Asian Le Mans Series symbolises the Spirit of Le Mans, holding the same shared passion for creating world class endurance racing in Asia. The Asian Le Mans Series is growing year on year and is attracting some of the world’s most successful endurance racing teams, as well as fostering new and emerging talent from the region.

programme.title: Late Night with Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated "Late Night with Seth Meyers," hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series’ signature "A Closer Look" segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Built for Billions

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions’ is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei

programme.title: Global Watch

programme.title: On Smiles and Stumbles, with Humbert Humbert (R)
programme.desc: The program features an interview with Humbert Humbert, the musical duo behind "Smiles and Stumbles," the theme song of the drama serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife". With Asagaya Shimai and Iwasaki Udai joining the show, it explores why the song has resonated so deeply across generations, drawing on stories shared by viewers and voices from the leading actors. It also uncovers the little‑known story of how the theme song was created through interviews with members of the production team.

This time, they take on ‘weather control’-from kilometer‑wide ocean curtains to giant wind turbines and missions that dive into super typhoons. programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 8
programme.desc: The 65th historical drama unfolds in the heart of the Sengoku era, portraying the miraculous story of the Toyotomi brothers, whose unbreakable bond lifted them from obscurity to achieve the extraordinary feat of unifying a nation. Toyotomi Hidenaga (Nakano Taiga), the younger brother of Japan’s great unifier Hideyoshi (Ikematsu Sosuke), was regarded as the greatest aide of the Sengoku era-many believed that the Toyotomi reign might have endured had he lived longer.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Demining Ukraine
programme.desc: As nearly a quarter of Ukraine's territory remains contaminated by landmines, we follow a Japanese scientist's use of radar technology to support demining efforts in the war-torn country.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Kobayashi Yoshitsugu published a trailblazing paper in June 2025 illuminating the evolutionary process of large tyrannosaurs - he explains how such research helps us consider the future of humanity.

programme.title: Why is Hay Fever Getting Worse?
programme.desc: The number of people suffering from hay fever, which seriously impacts daily life, is increasing worldwide - behind this trend is a change in pollen dispersal patterns influenced by climate change.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Spring Party: We visit one of the most famous cherry blossom spots in Edo - flower viewing parties were for eating, drinking, making merry and a chance for young men and women to mingle.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Faecal microbiota transplantation transfers gut bacteria from a healthy donor's stool into a patient's colon - it is being explored as a treatment for ulcerative colitis, Parkinson's disease and ADHD.

programme.title: Iwate
programme.desc: Come on a scenic drive through Iwate's rich nature - starting from Morioka station, we head to the picturesque Jodogahama beach and make a detour to Tono - known for its kappa legends - along the way.

programme.title: Through the Kitchen Window
programme.desc: Wajima Eiko crafts wonderful dishes from the unsold catch at the fish market in a small fishing town where she has worked for over 50 years.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Reimagining Analogue Design. Analogue is coming back and offering a human appeal to our five senses that digital lacks - explore designs that reveal the charm and potential of analogue.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: Many Chinese families choose educational migration to Chiang Mai to enrol their children in international schools, avoid intense academic pressure, and provide new options for their futures.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Demining Ukraine
programme.desc: As nearly a quarter of Ukraine's territory remains contaminated by landmines, we follow a Japanese scientist's use of radar technology to support demining efforts in the war-torn country.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: How can farming in Japan be made more exciting? That question drives a farmer from Indonesia who sees potential to help his community via agriculture.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter. This time: lotion tissues.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Australian Phillip Richards gives back to his adopted home of Nozawaonsen by crafting gin and whiskey using local ingredients - we explore what draws him to this small village in Nagano Prefecture.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Being at War
programme.desc: Fighting to ensure their sacrifice wasn't in vain, Ukrainian Special Ops soldier Vlad documents life and death at the front - discover the raw face of combat through 40 hours of firsthand footage.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Trouble in Paradise: Okhotsk Confronts Climate Change
programme.desc: Climate change in the Sea of Okhotsk threatens the rich ecosystem of Shiretoko Peninsula; decreases in sea ice and spawning fish have upset the natural balance and put once-common brown bears at risk.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A local supermarket has won grand prize four years in a row in a major deli dish competition - we follow the deli dish maker who sparked this success. Behind her smile is a past driven to desperation.

programme.title: Dining with the Chef mini
programme.desc: Traditional techniques and resourceful recipes in just five minutes! Chefs Saito and Rika present their unique approaches to cooking delicious Japanese food.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Reimagining Analogue Design. Analogue is coming back and offering a human appeal to our five senses that digital lacks - explore designs that reveal the charm and potential of analogue.

programme.title: Design Ah Neo
programme.desc: 'Dimensions' Special: Design is fun - design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose
programme.desc: This programme employs 'mitateru', a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Samurai Castles
programme.desc: 400-year-old Matsue Castle retains its national treasure of an original keep - black and imposing, it stands like a battleship. Why did the lord build such an enormous keep on such a small site?

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: Morning: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history and culture - explore the unique culture behind them. This episode looks at words related to morning.

programme.title: Matsuri: The Heartbeat of Japan
programme.desc: The Kawanishi Dainenbutsu Kenbai dance tells the story of restless souls being guided to the Pure Land by the Buddha in the form of a monkey - in 2022, it became a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Izumo: Forum of the Deities
programme.desc: Shinto deities gather in Izumo in the tenth month of the lunar calendar to discuss the intertwining of fate - we explore Japan's spirit of harmony through this ritual.

programme.title: National Parks of Japan
programme.desc: Daisen-Oki: Daisen-Oki National Park comprises the Oki Islands, which boast spectacular geological formations, and a mainland area with shrines and sacred mountains that inspired myths and legends.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Be earthquake-ready and learn survival tips for quakes and when you're trapped under rubble - you'll want to watch this before your next trip to Japan!

programme.title: Designing Thread
programme.desc: Yamagata / Nakui Naoko (Book Designer): Thread for traditional 'shina' fabric takes a year to make - ultrafine mohair is also made here with a 60-year-old device. Nakui admires the hunt to improve.

programme.desc: We follow the demolition of a Kumamoto Castle tower damaged by a major earthquake - built 400 years ago by fierce feudal lord Kato Kiyomasa, its secrets are revealed through demolition.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This time, angela - a duo popular for anime songs - and SKE48, a Nagoya-based sister group of AKB48, stop by the studio to chat and perform.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Tohoku: Animation series about a Japanese dog who meets and is helped by many mythical creatures of northern Japan as he searches for eight star talismans.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: End-of-life planning is spreading in Japan - some people are planning ahead and choosing low-cost shared graves over family graves, and some cities are offering end-of-life planning support.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Sanagijima Island is home to lots of free-roaming cats - Kuji rests on some cool shrine steps as other cats hang out close to the sea carefully making their way along a seawall... what are they doing?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: We meet people in Kumamoto who cherish their ancestry and nature such as a traditional inlay artisan, a group passing on the history of the building of an embankment, and a brown cattle breeder.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: After having an accident one day, Mee wondered, 'Maybe I don't need underpants?' Through interviews with passers-by and a wild imagination, Mee searches for reasons to wear underpants.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Matera in southern Italy is a town carved into pale limestone cliffs - with its rows of cave dwellings, this city has been home to people for thousands of years and is now a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Ramen Japan

programme.desc: Tsubo-niwa - life enhanced by quintessential spaces. Dive deep into the beauty of the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.desc: This time: making suggestions. Marianne from the Philippines has worked for two years as a housekeeper; her company want her service to go to the next level by learning how to make recommendations.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Maro Kuratani knits scarves and other items with surplus yarn, using threads of varying colour and thickness. She says yarn is the ultimate eco-friendly material as reknitting is always an option.

programme.title: On the Wings 5min.
programme.desc: Hop on from Narita - the air gateway to Japan - as breathtaking window views await flying above active volcanoes!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: We meet people in Kumamoto who cherish their ancestry and nature such as a traditional inlay artisan, a group passing on the history of the building of an embankment, and a brown cattle breeder.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: After having an accident one day, Mee wondered, 'Maybe I don't need underpants?' Through interviews with passers-by and a wild imagination, Mee searches for reasons to wear underpants.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This time, angela - a duo popular for anime songs - and SKE48, a Nagoya-based sister group of AKB48, stop by the studio to chat and perform.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Tohoku: Animation series about a Japanese dog who meets and is helped by many mythical creatures of northern Japan as he searches for eight star talismans.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: End-of-life planning is spreading in Japan - some people are planning ahead and choosing low-cost shared graves over family graves, and some cities are offering end-of-life planning support.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Sanagijima Island is home to lots of free-roaming cats - Kuji rests on some cool shrine steps as other cats hang out close to the sea carefully making their way along a seawall... what are they doing?

programme.title: Unkind Ladies - EP 9
programme.desc: Unkind Ladies follows three generations of strong-willed women in one household led by matriarch Kang Sunok, and the ups and downs in their careers, love lives and family relationships.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of "power." They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.desc: An unexpected pregnancy complicates a couple's life as they grapple with becoming parents.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 5

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2753
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.desc: The body of the urban dweller is prone to problems. Vital Lifeline deconstructs your health. Each episode invites medical experts to explain the causes of various diseases, as well as physical therapists and sports therapists to teach appropriate exercises.

programme.title: Shining Just for You - EP 9
programme.desc: Ye Ling Shuang is a young woman who can foresee great tragedies and disasters before they happen. What will she do in the face of her "curse" as well as the Emperor's demands?

programme.title: Food Mister
programme.desc: Have you wondered what fictional dishes in the literature would taste like? We invite a star chef to find inspiration from TV series, video games, cartoons and literary classics, discovering some of the special delicacies mentioned in them, and recreating these seemingly unreal dishes.

programme.title: Big Big Home
programme.desc: Our host travels throughout Taiwan, delving into prime urban locations and promising new town developments to explore impressive luxury villas and unique homes. Several "dreamers" also share their local property buying stories and lifestyle guides.

programme.desc: The fourth season of this popular cross-regional music talent contest designed for adults aged 35 and above expands global recruitment, welcoming contestants from Hong Kong, Macao, mainland China, North America, Singapore, Malaysia and Australia.

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 829
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 3
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2157
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sum is surprised by Wai-man’s background in Chinese medicine as she sees him using acupuncture to treat Wing-yan in an emergency. Ching-chi applies for an illustrator job. But she is turned down due to her disability. Ching-chi takes Ka-chun to an art exhibition.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 17
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2157
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart - EP 34
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 829
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 12
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 38
programme.desc: A drama of mythical ancient times starring Yang Zi and Zhang Wanyi. The drama is adapted from novel titled Miss You Forever by the writer, Tonghua. It tells the story of love and hatred between Xiaoyao and Qiangxuan, Tu Shanjing, Chishui Fenglong and Xiangliu.

programme.title: Lost You Forever Season 1 - EP 39
programme.desc: A drama of mythical ancient times starring Yang Zi and Zhang Wanyi. The drama is adapted from novel titled Miss You Forever by the writer, Tonghua. It tells the story of love and hatred between Xiaoyao and Qiangxuan, Tu Shanjing, Chishui Fenglong and Xiangliu.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 5
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man is relieved as Yin-cho is in a stable condition. Wing-sum and her chums celebrate, and Sai-hang seizes some chance to make her drunk. Wai-man turns up and scolds Sai-hang. However, there’s nothing he can do as the transaction is a done deal. After getting drunk, Wing-sum is taken away by Sai-hang.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 6
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] By means of Chinese medical methodology, Wai-man prescribes supplements for Yin-cho’s drunkenness and Yee-ting’s stomach issues. Yee-ting covertly fancies Wai-man. Wing-sum quits her real estate agent job. Wai-man asks her to help him with the design of the arcade in the renovation project, and Wing-sum is able to again pursue her interior design dream.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang teams up with the media to smear Herbal Painless. In the program, reporters ask Shuk-foon leading questions, inadvertently sparking public opinion about Herbal Painless plagiarizing Yam Yuen. Wai-man is not affected by gossip. Instead, he plans to launch some new medicated oil.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] While sorting out old stuff in the arcade, Wing-sum accidentally breaks the precious medicine pot left behind by Yam-yuen. Wing-sum feels guilty and spends the night learning how to repair a clay pot. After finding out the situation, Wai-man lends a helping hand.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sum is surprised by Wai-man’s background in Chinese medicine as she sees him using acupuncture to treat Wing-yan in an emergency. Ching-chi applies for an illustrator job. But she is turned down due to her disability. Ching-chi takes Ka-chun to an art exhibition.

programme.title: Not Others - EP 7
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: The Midnight Studio - EP 12
programme.desc: The series tells a thrilling story of mean photographer Seo Ki Joo (Joo Won) who runs a photo studio that exists only for the deceased, passionate lawyer Han Boo (Kwon Nara) and the eerie night visitors, who travel between life and death

programme.title: Why Is He Still Single - EP 6
programme.desc: A quirky yet kind-hearted man, firmly against marriage, sparks humor and reflection as he navigates life. Despite his eccentricity, he finally meets the woman of his dreams and must decide how to win her heart.

programme.title: Why Is He Still Single - EP 7
programme.desc: A quirky yet kind-hearted man, firmly against marriage, sparks humor and reflection as he navigates life. Despite his eccentricity, he finally meets the woman of his dreams and must decide how to win her heart.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 1
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Happy Ever After - EP 35
programme.desc: TUNG KOON (AU YEUNG CHUN WAH, BOBBY) born with a special ‘King’s Tongue’ is betrayed by his assistant, SIU SIU (CHAN MIU YING, MARIANE) who had prepared some chili source without permission. TUNG is accused of deceiving the Emperor and is forced to flee from Guangzhou to the capital. When SIU discovered that someone had used her to trap TUNG, she sees TUNG in person and apologizes. TUNG and SIU eventually reconcile. Love feeling blossoms between them.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 5
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: The Runner - EP 15
programme.desc: Web media editor Ho Ka-yan (Elaine Yiu) encounters track and field coach Yuen Nik (Joel Chan) as she is assigned the task of approaching the Windchasers Club and digging up scandalous dirt. Because of some past regrettable incident, Yuen Nik avoids socializing with other people. But he is getting closer and closer to Ka-yan as he repeatedly mingles with her. Kwok Bui-yee (Tiffany Lau), daughter of tycoon Kwok Wong-po (Ram Chiang), eagerly joins Windchasers as she has some ulterior motive.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 1
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Law dis-Order - EP 20
programme.desc: As the founder of the leading Chinese law firm, CHEUK KAI-YIU (Lau Dan) has been re-elected as chairman of the committee for many terms. Though he promised managing partner LAU KING-CHANG (Liu Kai Chi) that he would step down, he deliberately brings in a materialistic lawyer called CHEUNG KEUNG (Alex Fong) to counterbalance KING-CHANG's obsession with power.

programme.title: Law dis-Order - EP 21
programme.desc: As the founder of the leading Chinese law firm, CHEUK KAI-YIU (Lau Dan) has been re-elected as chairman of the committee for many terms. programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 4
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hello Missfortune - EP 9
programme.desc: In a multidimensional domain, Poon Siu-yu (Erica Chan) enters the second dimension after her death in the first dimension, i.e. the mortal realm. She then joins Office of the Life Authority and becomes a novice "destiny administrator". Siu-yu has to keep a close watch on food courier Chan Pei-ho (Hubert Wu), who is in the mortal realm. Pei-ho earns a meager living regardless of the weather. But his family members just do not care about him.

programme.title: Pages Of Treasures - EP 14
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

programme.title: Pages Of Treasures - EP 15
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 7
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Legend Of Master Chai - EP 8
programme.desc: In Heaven, Chai (Leung Wing Chun) killed Huen (Ho Po Sang) over a pot of sweet lotus seed soup. He was expelled to earth to suffer, while at the same time, he had to help Huen and Nui, who were also sent down to earth, to regain their powers._x000D__x000D_Chai was punished to become the stupid and shabby son, of an earthly man. Huen, on the other hand, was his handsome and clever brother, who was loved by all. One day, Chai regained his magic power and started to challenge Huen.

programme.title: The Silver Chamber Of Sorrows - EP 4
programme.desc: "Sheung’s Silver Chamber", the largest jewel company in Foshan, Guangdong Province China, is facing serious financial difficulties. In order to obtain a loan from SHUM’s family, SHEUNG HANG (Chun Pui), owner of the Chamber, together with his primary wife, CHOI SIU-DIP (Sit Ka Yin), plot to arrange marriage between SHEUNG WAN (Ng Wai Kwok), HANG’s younger brother, and SHUM WING-TUNG (Young Yuen Yee), daughter of SHUM’s family.

programme.title: Hello Missfortune - EP 9
programme.desc: In a multidimensional domain, Poon Siu-yu (Erica Chan) enters the second dimension after her death in the first dimension, i.e. the mortal realm. She then joins Office of the Life Authority and becomes a novice "destiny administrator". Siu-yu has to keep a close watch on food courier Chan Pei-ho (Hubert Wu), who is in the mortal realm. Pei-ho earns a meager living regardless of the weather. But his family members just do not care about him.

programme.title: Pages Of Treasures - EP 14
programme.desc: Bookshop staff FONG HOK MAN (Chun Pui) always believes that "knowledge is power". He tries hard to encourage his older son FONG SUM MING (Lai Yiu Cheung) and his younger son FONG SUM CHING (Suen Eric) to study more. Unfortunately, MING is not good at studying at all and he quits after secondary school. On the other hand, CHING is a very smart boy and MING works hard overseas to support CHING’s further studies on computer sciences in America.
